# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: c:/_repositories/PkgXtractor/build-win
# It was generated by CMake: C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Allows to build against installed googletest. This is unsupported
// if the commit isn't the one in known_good.json
ALLOW_EXTERNAL_GTEST:BOOL=OFF

//Allows to build against installed SPIRV-Tools-opt. This is unsupported
// if the commit isn't the one in known_good.json
ALLOW_EXTERNAL_SPIRV_TOOLS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
AWK:FILEPATH=AWK-NOTFOUND

//Build external dependencies in /External
BUILD_EXTERNAL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable warnings as errors (default is OFF)
BUILD_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Boost.
Boost_DIR:PATH=Boost_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CCACHE_TOOL_PATH:FILEPATH=CCACHE_TOOL_PATH-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/llvm-ar.exe

//ASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/clang.exe

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/llvm-ar.exe

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/clang-scan-deps.exe

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/llvm-ranlib.exe

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//MASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_MASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/BuildTools/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.44.35207/bin/Hostx64/x64/ml64.exe

//MASM flags
CMAKE_ASM_MASM_FLAGS:STRING= /I"C:/Program Files (x86)/Windows Kits/10/Include/10.0.26100.0/shared"

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/clang++.exe

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/llvm-ar.exe

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/clang-scan-deps.exe

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=C:/LLVM/bin/llvm-ranlib.exe

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-O0 -g -Xclang -gcodeview

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -DNDEBUG -g -Xclang -gcodeview

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD:UNINITIALIZED=23

//Libraries linked by default with all C++ applications.
CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=-lkernel32 -luser32 -lgdi32 -lwinspool -lshell32 -lole32 -loleaut32 -luuid -lcomdlg32 -ladvapi32 -loldnames

//No help, variable specified on the command line.

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console

CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Use Doxygen to create the HTML-based API documentation
CRYPTOPP_BUILD_DOCUMENTATION:BOOL=OFF

//Build shared library
CRYPTOPP_BUILD_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Disable Altivec
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_ALTIVEC:BOOL=OFF

//Disable AES
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_ARM_AES:BOOL=OFF

//Disable NEON
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_ARM_NEON:BOOL=OFF

//Disable PMULL
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_ARM_PMULL:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SHA
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_ARM_SHA:BOOL=OFF

//Disable ASM
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_ASM:BOOL=OFF

//Disable AVX
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_AVX:BOOL=OFF

//Disable CLMUL
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_CLMUL:BOOL=OFF

//Disable POWER7
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_POWER7:BOOL=OFF

//Disable POWER8
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_POWER8:BOOL=OFF

//Disable POWER9
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_POWER9:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SHA
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_SHA:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SSE4
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_SSE4:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SSSE3
CRYPTOPP_DISABLE_SSSE3:BOOL=OFF

//Set the dir where the headers get installed. Defaults to cryptopp.
CRYPTOPP_INCLUDE_PREFIX:STRING=cryptopp

//Use the provided location for crypto++ sources; do not fetch
CRYPTOPP_SOURCES:PATH=C:/_repositories/PkgXtractor/externals/cryptopp

//Use a common intermediate objects target for the static and shared
// library targets
CRYPTOPP_USE_INTERMEDIATE_OBJECTS_TARGET:BOOL=ON

//Get crypto++ from the master branch, not from a release tag
CRYPTOPP_USE_MASTER_BRANCH:BOOL=OFF

//Enable OpenMP to parallelize some of the algorithms. Note that
// this isn't always faster, see https://www.cryptopp.com/wiki/OpenMP
CRYPTOPP_USE_OPENMP:BOOL=OFF

//Include the PEM-Pack in compiliation (https://github.com/noloader/cryptopp-pem)
CRYPTOPP_USE_PEM_PACK:BOOL=OFF

DOXYGEN_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=DOXYGEN_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Enables Exceptions
ENABLE_EXCEPTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Use AddressSanitizer to detect memory errors
SDL_ASAN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable assembly routines
SDL_ASSEMBLY:BOOL=ON

//Enable internal sanity checks (auto/disabled/release/enabled/paranoid)
SDL_ASSERTIONS:STRING=auto

//Enable the Audio subsystem
SDL_AUDIO:BOOL=ON

//Use AVX assembly routines
SDL_AVX:BOOL=ON

//Use AVX2 assembly routines
SDL_AVX2:BOOL=ON

//Use AVX512F assembly routines
SDL_AVX512F:BOOL=ON

//number to use for magic backgrounding signal or 'OFF'
SDL_BACKGROUNDING_SIGNAL:STRING=OFF

//Enable the Camera subsystem
SDL_CAMERA:BOOL=ON

//Use Ccache to speed up build
SDL_CCACHE:BOOL=OFF

//Extra includes (for CMAKE_REQUIRED_INCLUDES)
SDL_CHECK_REQUIRED_INCLUDES:STRING=

//Extra link options (for CMAKE_REQUIRED_LINK_OPTIONS)
SDL_CHECK_REQUIRED_LINK_OPTIONS:STRING=

//Run clang-tidy static analysis
SDL_CLANG_TIDY:BOOL=OFF

//Use clock_gettime() instead of gettimeofday()
SDL_CLOCK_GETTIME:BOOL=OFF

//Detected architecture ARM32
SDL_CPU_ARM32:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture ARM64
SDL_CPU_ARM64:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture ARM64EC
SDL_CPU_ARM64EC:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture EMSCRIPTEN
SDL_CPU_EMSCRIPTEN:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture LOONGARCH64

//Detected architecture POWERPC32

//Detected architecture POWERPC64

//Detected architecture RISCV64
SDL_CPU_RISCV64:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture X64
SDL_CPU_X64:BOOL=1

//Detected architecture X86
SDL_CPU_X86:BOOL=0

//Load dependencies dynamically
SDL_DEPS_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//Enable the Dialog subsystem
SDL_DIALOG:BOOL=ON

//Use DirectX for Windows audio/video
SDL_DIRECTX:BOOL=ON

//Support the disk writer audio driver
SDL_DISKAUDIO:BOOL=ON

//Support the dummy audio driver
SDL_DUMMYAUDIO:BOOL=ON

//Support the dummy camera driver
SDL_DUMMYCAMERA:BOOL=ON

//Use dummy video driver
SDL_DUMMYVIDEO:BOOL=ON

//Build the examples directory
SDL_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//number to use for magic foregrounding signal or 'OFF'
SDL_FOREGROUNDING_SIGNAL:STRING=OFF

//Use gcc builtin atomics
SDL_GCC_ATOMICS:BOOL=ON

//Enable the GPU subsystem
SDL_GPU:BOOL=ON

//Enable the Haptic subsystem
SDL_HAPTIC:BOOL=ON

//Enable the HIDAPI subsystem
SDL_HIDAPI:BOOL=ON

//Use HIDAPI for low level joystick drivers
SDL_HIDAPI_JOYSTICK:BOOL=ON

//Use libusb for low level joystick drivers
SDL_HIDAPI_LIBUSB:BOOL=ON

//Dynamically load libusb support
SDL_HIDAPI_LIBUSB_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//Enable installation of SDL3
SDL_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Root folder where to install SDL3Config.cmake related files (SDL3
// subfolder for MSVC projects)
SDL_INSTALL_CMAKEDIR_ROOT:STRING=cmake

//Support the JACK audio API
SDL_JACK:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the Joystick subsystem
SDL_JOYSTICK:BOOL=ON

//Use KMS DRM video driver
SDL_KMSDRM:BOOL=OFF

//Use the system C library
SDL_LIBC:BOOL=ON

//Prefer iconv() from libiconv, if available, over libc version
SDL_LIBICONV:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libudev support
SDL_LIBUDEV:BOOL=ON

//Use MMX assembly routines
SDL_MMX:BOOL=ON

//Use offscreen video driver
SDL_OFFSCREEN:BOOL=ON

//Include OpenGL support
SDL_OPENGL:BOOL=ON

//Include OpenGL ES support
SDL_OPENGLES:BOOL=ON

//Use OpenVR video driver
SDL_OPENVR:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the Power subsystem
SDL_POWER:BOOL=ON

//Use POSIX threads for multi-threading
SDL_PTHREADS:BOOL=OFF

//Use PulseAudio
SDL_PULSEAUDIO:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the Render subsystem
SDL_RENDER:BOOL=ON

//Enable the Direct3D 9 render driver
SDL_RENDER_D3D:BOOL=ON

//Enable the Direct3D 11 render driver
SDL_RENDER_D3D11:BOOL=ON

//Enable the Direct3D 12 render driver
SDL_RENDER_D3D12:BOOL=ON

//Enable the SDL_GPU render driver
SDL_RENDER_GPU:BOOL=ON

//Enable the Vulkan render driver
SDL_RENDER_VULKAN:BOOL=ON

//Custom SDL revision (only used when REVISION.txt does not exist)
SDL_REVISION:STRING=

//Use an rpath when linking SDL
SDL_RPATH:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the Sensor subsystem
SDL_SENSOR:BOOL=ON

//Build a shared version of the library
SDL_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Support the sndio audio API
SDL_SNDIO:BOOL=OFF

//Use SSE assembly routines
SDL_SSE:BOOL=ON

//Use SSE2 assembly routines
SDL_SSE2:BOOL=ON

//Use SSE3 assembly routines
SDL_SSE3:BOOL=ON

//Use SSE4.1 assembly routines
SDL_SSE4_1:BOOL=ON

//Use SSE4.2 assembly routines
SDL_SSE4_2:BOOL=ON

//Build a static version of the library
SDL_STATIC:BOOL=ON

//Use iconv() from system-installed libraries
SDL_SYSTEM_ICONV:BOOL=OFF

//Timeout multiplier to account for really slow machines
SDL_TESTS_TIMEOUT_MULTIPLIER:STRING=1

//Enable the Tray subsystem
SDL_TRAY:BOOL=ON

//Enable uninstallation of SDL3
SDL_UNINSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Vendor name and/or version to add to SDL_REVISION
SDL_VENDOR_INFO:STRING=

//Enable the Video subsystem
SDL_VIDEO:BOOL=ON

//Enable the virtual-joystick driver
SDL_VIRTUAL_JOYSTICK:BOOL=ON

//Enable Vulkan support
SDL_VULKAN:BOOL=ON

//Use the Windows WASAPI audio driver
SDL_WASAPI:BOOL=ON

//Use Wayland video driver
SDL_WAYLAND:BOOL=OFF

//Enable -Werror
SDL_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//Use X11 video driver
SDL_X11:BOOL=OFF

//Use Xinput for Windows
SDL_XINPUT:BOOL=ON

//Build tests
SIRIT_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Use system SPIR-V headers
SIRIT_USE_SYSTEM_SPIRV_HEADERS:BOOL=OFF

SKIP_GLSLANG_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

SKIP_INSTALL_ALL:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
SPIRV-Headers_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=C:/_repositories/PkgXtractor/build-win/externals/sirit/externals/SPIRV-Headers

//Value Computed by CMake
SPIRV-Headers_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
SPIRV-Headers_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/_repositories/PkgXtractor/externals/sirit/externals/SPIRV-Headers

//Install SPIRV-Headers
SPIRV_HEADERS_ENABLE_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Test SPIRV-Headers
SPIRV_HEADERS_ENABLE_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//enable access check feature (beta)
TOML11_ENABLE_ACCESS_CHECK:BOOL=OFF

//precompile toml11 library
TOML11_PRECOMPILE:BOOL=OFF

//Enforce callstack collection for tracy regions
TRACY_CALLSTACK:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build Tracy python client library
TRACY_CLIENT_PYTHON:BOOL=OFF

//Enable debuginfod support
TRACY_DEBUGINFOD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable delayed initialization of the library (init on first call)
TRACY_DELAYED_INIT:BOOL=OFF

//[advanced] Don't use default demangling function - You'll need
// to provide your own
TRACY_DEMANGLE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable profiling
TRACY_ENABLE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable fibers support
TRACY_FIBERS:BOOL=OFF

//Build Fortran bindings
TRACY_Fortran:BOOL=OFF

//Ignore instrumentation errors from memory free events that do
// not have a matching allocation
TRACY_IGNORE_MEMORY_FAULTS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libbacktrace to support dynamically loaded elfs in symbol
// resolution resolution after the first symbol resolve operation
TRACY_LIBBACKTRACE_ELF_DYNLOAD_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//Use libunwind backtracing where supported
TRACY_LIBUNWIND_BACKTRACE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Link-Time optimization
TRACY_LTO:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the manual lifetime management of the profile
TRACY_MANUAL_LIFETIME:BOOL=OFF

//Disable client discovery by broadcast to local network
TRACY_NO_BROADCAST:BOOL=OFF

//Disable all callstack related functionality
TRACY_NO_CALLSTACK:BOOL=ON

//Disables the inline functions in callstacks
TRACY_NO_CALLSTACK_INLINES:BOOL=OFF

//Disable collection of source code
TRACY_NO_CODE_TRANSFER:BOOL=ON

//Disable capture of context switches
TRACY_NO_CONTEXT_SWITCH:BOOL=ON

//Disable crash handling
TRACY_NO_CRASH_HANDLER:BOOL=ON

//Client executable does not exit until all profile data is sent
// to server
TRACY_NO_EXIT:BOOL=OFF

//Disable the frame image support and its thread
TRACY_NO_FRAME_IMAGE:BOOL=ON

//Disable call stack sampling
TRACY_NO_SAMPLING:BOOL=ON

//Disable systrace sampling
TRACY_NO_SYSTEM_TRACING:BOOL=ON

//Disable zone validation for C API
TRACY_NO_VERIFY:BOOL=OFF

//Disable capture of hardware Vsync events
TRACY_NO_VSYNC_CAPTURE:BOOL=OFF

//Tracy will only accept connections on IPv4 addresses (disable
// IPv6)
TRACY_ONLY_IPV4:BOOL=OFF

//Only listen on the localhost interface
TRACY_ONLY_LOCALHOST:BOOL=ON

//On-demand profiling
TRACY_ON_DEMAND:BOOL=ON

//Enable nopsleds for efficient patching by system-level tools
// (e.g. rr)
TRACY_PATCHABLE_NOPSLEDS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build Tracy as a static library
TRACY_STATIC:BOOL=ON

//Instead of full runtime symbol resolution, only resolve the image
// path and offset to enable offline symbol resolution
TRACY_SYMBOL_OFFLINE_RESOLVE:BOOL=OFF

//Use lower resolution timers
TRACY_TIMER_FALLBACK:BOOL=OFF

//[advanced] Verbose output from the profiler
TRACY_VERBOSE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable install target
TSL_ROBIN_MAP_ENABLE_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Dependencies for the target
TracyClient_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;ws2_32;general;dbghelp;

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=C:/_repositories/PkgXtractor/build-win/externals/tracy

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/_repositories/PkgXtractor/externals/tracy

WITH_AVX2:BOOL=ON

WITH_AVX512:BOOL=ON

WITH_AVX512VNNI:BOOL=ON

//Build test/benchmarks

//Build application benchmarks

//Enable code coverage reporting

//Enable optimized CRC32 algorithm Chorba

//Build test/fuzz

//Compile with support for gzFile related functions

//Build with project maintainer warnings
WITH_MAINTAINER_WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Build with PCLMULQDQ

//Reduced memory usage for special cases (reduces performance)

//Build with SSE42

//Path to a file.
ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=ZLIB_LIBRARY_RELEASE-NOTFOUND

//Give this prefix to all publicly exported symbols.
//\nUseful when embedding into a larger library.
//\nDefault is no prefix (empty prefix).
ZLIB_SYMBOL_PREFIX:STRING=

ZYAN_DEV_MODE:BOOL=OFF

//Forces asserts in release builds.

// like kernel drivers)
